title: Villagers Who Don't Study Well│不好好讀書的村民
description: Villagers may become Nitwit Villagers when they grow up.│村民長大以後可能會變成傻子村民。
body:
# Function│功能
Villagers have a 10% chance of turning into Nitwit villagers when they grow up, which is the same as the Bedrock Edition features.│村民長大以後有10%概率變成傻子村民，同步基岩版特性。
